task_objective: Instagram Global Viral Copy - Transform input image into 3 native English IG post/Reel copy options with aesthetic positioning, English-only output

source_image.focus: Visual elements, aesthetic category, lifestyle aspiration, Main Character Energy potential, and conversion hooks
source_image.role: Provide visual references for Instagram viral copy generation

workflow.step_1: Aesthetic decode: identify IG aesthetic category (minimal, old money, soft girl, clean girl, etc.) and aspiration triggers
workflow.step_2: Generate 3 viral copy options: aesthetic soft girl / DM automation conversion / micro-blog value story, each with native IG formatting
workflow.step_3: Output structured copy with IG SEO keywords and hashtags, 100% English

outputs.option_1: Aesthetic & Soft Girl - Minimal luxury, vibe-driven, aspirational. Native IG line-break formatting
outputs.option_2: DM Automation / High Conversion - Comment-trigger funnel (Comment 'LINK' for details), IG's hottest monetization play
outputs.option_3: Micro-Blog / Value Driven - Story-driven, educational, ideal for Carousel posts. Longer format with value hooks
outputs.seo_keywords: IG SEO optimized keywords for search discovery
outputs.hashtags: Mix of high-volume + long-tail precision hashtags for IG algorithm

output_requirements: Output ONLY the final structured copy, 100% ENGLISH, no Chinese, no analysis
ALL selling points MUST be grounded in actual image content - never fabricate
Use native IG expressions and formatting: line breaks for breathing room, minimal elegant punctuation
Aesthetic positioning: elevate to Main Character Energy, aspirational lifestyle
DM Automation option: must include ManyChat-style trigger (Comment 'XXX' for...)
Micro-blog option: value-first, story-driven, save-worthy content structure
Hashtags: strategic mix of mega (#aesthetic) + mid-tier (#cleangirlaesthetic) + long-tail (#musthaves2024)
